copypastas.text: Hello fl0m, It’s me, your only viewer. For years I have created the illusion that you are streaming to many people, but here’s the truth: all these people are me. And now, for you to be convinced of this, I will send this message from all my other accounts.
hellO FL0M DID YOU SEE THE 50 GIFTED? THANK YOU FOR BEING A GREAT STREAMER
just logged into my steam account after 10 years and sold my inventory for over 125k ! I had 3 iBP holos as they were my favorite team in 2014, FN knight, 3 huntsman knives etc.

You’re full buying with no comms and 30 ping. I’m dry swinging with perfect timing and 53 MPG. While you're arguing over who threw the round, I’m silently clutching AND saving the planet — in my 2017 Toyota Prius. Hybrid engine, stealth mode IRL. Eco round? Buddy, I live there. You’re loud on mic, I’m quiet on emissions. Prius players don’t rage — we regenerate.

Guys please give fl0m money. I can't stand to see him sad and 5 gifted would brighten his day immensely. Just the thought of this brings light to my world, because he is the counter strike streamer of our generation. 5 gifted is the great cleanser of sadness, so please open up your wallets and enter the 3 digits on the back of your credit card to turn this wave of depression into a movement of joy.
